approver: User in Codex task / human owner
defect: A plaintext synthetic login credential was committed in an out-of-scope local role-bootstrap script.

verification.source_path_state: approved safe comment-only SQL source restored

recovery_approval.scope: Restore only the previously approved one-line disposable database comment source and retain the existing read-only Compose mount.

human_follow_up: Rotate or invalidate the exposed synthetic credential in every environment where it may have been used. The value remains present in existing Git history until separately authorized remediation occurs.
